Package index

All functions

Download ACLED events via the myACLED OAuth API

Download ACLED Data for Explosion Events in the Gaza Strip

Centroids of Populated 1km INSPIRE Grid Cells in Austria

Polygons for Austria's 9 State Capitals
at_get_austria_poly()
Get Austria Boundary Shape at Specified Resolution
at_get_gemeinden()
Get Austrian Gemeinde Geodaten for Any Year
at_income_poi
Poles of Inaccessibility / Centroids for Austria-wide Zählsprengel
at_pkw_kraftstoff_hist
Historical Pkw-Neuzulassungen by Bundesland and Kraftstoffart (2006–2025)

Download and Crop NDVI Data from Copernicus CDSE S3
cdse_list_ndvi_products()
List Available Copernicus NDVI Products
cdse_set_credentials()
Set Copernicus Data Space Ecosystem Credentials
dav_compare()
Compare multiple vectors
dav_coords_to_country()
Get Country from Coordinates (Spatial)
dav_create_article_dst()
Create a derstandard.at-styled Quarto Article
dav_use_matilda()
Use STMatilda Fonts in ggplot2
dw_dst() dw_ndr()

Create a Formatted Timestamp String
dw_update_locator_map()
Update a Datawrapper Locator Map with Markers

Get EAWS Microregions with Ratings
eaws_get_season_data()

envir_get_sea_ice_extent()

ff()
Create a Customized Data Frame Search Function
find_cell_in_lookup()
Find a raster cell containing a specific coordinate from a lookup directory
find_contrast_color()
Find Optimal Contrasting Colors

gaza_commodity_prices()
Download and Process Gaza Commodity Price Data
gaza_crop_rasters_for_aoi()
Crop a List of Rasters to an AOI
gaza_daily_casualties()
Fetches the daily casualty reports for Gaza
gaza_find_rasters_for_aoi()
Find Rasters Intersecting an AOI (Polygon or Points)
gaza_infrastructure_damaged()
Fetches data on damaged infrastructure in Gaza
gaza_killed()
Fetches the complete list of known individuals killed in Gaza
gaza_killed_v3()
Fetches and processes the v3 list of known individuals killed in Gaza
gaza_people_killed()
Download and Read "Killed in Gaza" Data from HDX
gaza_press_killed()
Fetches the list of journalists killed in Gaza
gaza_summary_data()
Fetches summary data across all datasets
gaza_top_translated_names()
Fetches the counts of the top 10 translated first names by age group
gaza_west_bank_casualties()
Fetches the daily casualty reports for the West Bank

Extract and Select Subdataset Information from a Raster File
geo_create_clipped_laea()
Create opposing LAEA projections and clipping masks for world maps
